intro: Odontoloma schlechtendalii, also known as Odontonema or Purple Fountain Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to Brazil and other parts of South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties.
